headline: GigaGloud Technology and Vulcan Materials have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: GigaCloud Technology's surge in revenue and earnings momentum lifts its outlook, while Vulcan Materials faces slowing construction demand, an earnings miss and valuation concerns.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on EOG Resources, Raises Price Target to $155
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Hanwen Chang   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $127 to $155.

headline: Oil’s war-driven volatility pulls in record retail money, fueling 'meme-style' trading
summary: Net retail buying of oil ETFs hit a record $211 million on March 12, surpassing the previous peak seen during the market turmoil in May 2020, according to Vanda Research.
